name: specify-implementation
when_to_use: When an architecture specification already exists and you need implementation detail.
When the TUI should guide the user through a synchronous implementation flow.

steps.description: Review the requirements, approach, and source architecture first.
steps.details: Confirm the architecture id and the relevant entities before drafting implementation detail.

steps.description: Run `powdrr-lift implementation-specification --work-item-name <work-item-name>` to generate the template.
steps.details: Use the generated implementation template as the canonical place to capture feature and decision detail.

steps.description: Fill out the feature and decision sections so they stay aligned with the architecture id.
steps.details: Keep the implementation spec aligned with the source architecture version and do not invent new ids.

steps.description: Validate with `powdrr-lift evaluate-implementation-specification --work-item-name <work-item-name>` and fix issues until it passes.
steps.details: Resolve architecture mismatches and duplicate ids before considering the document complete.
